compiled_state.title: create-dso-app.sh: colima and docker not detected -> colima not installed or configured for template project
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
create-dso-app.sh does not detect whether Docker or Colima is installed. If neither is present, Colima should be installed and configured automatically for the template project, since the nava-platform (and similar templates) require a container runtime.

## Expected vs Observed
- **Expected**: create-dso-app.sh checks for Docker first; if not found, checks for Colima; if neither found, installs Colima and runs 'colima start' with appropriate configuration (CPU/memory for the template's needs).
- **Observed**: create-dso-app.sh does not check for or install Docker/Colima, leaving template projects without a working container runtime.

## Affected Component
plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh — prerequisite detection and container runtime setup

## Notes
Reported by user during interactive session.

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test
